title: Web-Shell

8.name: SQL Injection
8.vuln: User input directly concatenated into query allows database compromise.

16.name: Local File Inclusion
16.vuln: Unvalidated include() allows directory traversal and arbitrary file execution.

21.name: XSS/IDOR
21.vuln: Unescaped output allows XSS; direct object reference exposes unauthorized data.

title: Processor

6.name: PHP Object Injection
6.vuln: unserialize() on user-controlled cookies allows an attacker to manipulate object properties or trigger 'magic methods' for Remote Code Execution (RCE).

15.name: Second-Order SQL Injection
15.vuln: Values extracted from the unserialized object are trusted and concatenated into the query, allowing injection via the 'category' property.

18.name: Order By/Limit Injection
18.vuln: The 'sort' and 'limit' parameters are injected into positions where traditional prepared statements often fail, allowing for time-based blind SQLi.

24.name: Code Injection via Data-Store
24.vuln: eval() executing content directly from a database column (which might have been tampered with via the previous SQLi) creates a perfect RCE pivot.
